reviews.comment:
La atención es buena.   Fui por un reclamo por un siniestro y la parte de seguros es tercerizada con LA CAJA   y se tiran la pelota uno al otro con los requerimientos.  Creí que los seguros del ACÁ eran propios.  Además dicen que trabajan de 9 a 17.30.  Pero me pasó 2 veces que estaban cerrados a la siesta

(Translated by Google)
The service is good. I went in to file a claim for an accident, and the insurance department is outsourced to La Caja, and they just pass the buck back and forth with the requests. I thought Acá's insurance was handled in-house. They also say they're open from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM, but twice they were closed during siesta.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4770193588747859421/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbWVqdzZ3RRAB
